data.title: Sutro Biopharma Presents Promising Preclinical Data Across its Pipeline of Next-Generation Single and Dual-Payload ADC Programs at AACR 2026
data.description: The drug STRO-004 has shown strong and consistent anti-cancer effects in various models of solid tumors expressing the targeted protein (TF), outperforming other similar antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) in terms of efficacy.
NEW ZEALAND PM CHRISTOPHER LUXON SAYS HE IS NOT CONSIDERING RESIGNING AHEAD OF NOVEMBER'S ELECTION DESPITE POLLS SHOWING DECLINING SUPPORT FOR HIM AND HIS NATIONAL PARTY.
NAB: CET1 RATIO IMPACTED BY ~20BPS FROM NZD WEAKNESS AND RATE VOLATILITY, WITH PRO FORMA CET1 RATIO AT MARCH 2026 TARGETED ABOVE 12%.
NAB: THE BANK PLANS A 1.5% DRP DISCOUNT WITH PARTIAL UNDERWRITING, AIMING TO RAISE UP TO A$1.8B AND ADD APPROXIMATELY 40BPS TO CET1 IN 2H26.
NAB ANTICIPATES A$706M IN CREDIT IMPAIRMENT CHARGES FOR 1H26, REVIEWING PROVISIONING AND CAPITAL SETTINGS TO REFLECT ELEVATED RISK WITH COLLECTIVE PROVISIONS TO CREDIT RWA AT 1.35%.
SK HYNIX: COMMENCES MANUFACTURING OF SOCAMN2 CHIPS ENGINEERED FOR NVIDIA'S VERA RUBIN PROCESSORS.
U.S. CRUDE OIL SURGES OVER 7.5%, TRADING ABOVE $90.
EUROPEAN GAS SURGES AS MUCH AS 9.8% AS IRAN SHUTS THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ ONCE MORE.
IRAN'S MILITARY: CARRIED OUT DRONE STRIKES ON SEVERAL U.S. NAVAL VESSELS FOLLOWING THE INCIDENT.
IRAN: THE VESSEL TARGETED BY THE U.S. WAS EN ROUTE FROM CHINA TO IRAN.
JAPAN PM TAKAICHI'S APPROVAL DROPS TO 53% PER MAINICHI; YOMIURI POLL SHOWS RATING AT 66%, DOWN 5 POINTS.
DOLLAR/YEN RISES 0.22% TO 159. STERLING FALLS 0.24% TO $1.3486. EURO DROPS 0.2% TO $1.174.
BRITISH FOREIGN OFFICE: NORTH KOREA'S BALLISTIC MISSILE TESTS ON 19 APRIL CONSTITUTE ANOTHER VIOLATION OF UN SECURITY COUNCIL RESOLUTIONS.

NEW ZEALAND TRADE BALANCE (MAR): SURPLUS OF NZ$698M VS REVISED DEFICIT OF NZ$365M PRIOR. EXPORTS ROSE TO NZ$7.94B FROM NZ$6.52B. IMPORTS AT NZ$7.25B FROM NZ$6.88B. 12-MONTH TRAILING DEFICIT WIDENED TO NZ$3.19B.
IRAN'S MILITARY ACCUSES THE U.S. OF FIRING ON AN IRANIAN COMMERCIAL VESSEL IN VIOLATION OF THE CEASEFIRE, WARNING OF RETALIATION OVER WHAT IT TERMS "MARITIME PIRACY."

data.title: Horse Powertrain Reveals X-Range C15 Direct Drive Powertrain for Hybridizing BEV Platforms
data.description: Beijing-based Horse Powertrain, known for innovative and eco-friendly powertrain systems, is set to introduce a groundbreaking product at the Beijing Auto Show 2026. The X-Range C15 Direct Drive is an all-in-one powertrain that combines a full hybrid system featuring a 4-cylinder engine, transmission, power electronics, and an electric motor. This unique design consolidates these components into a single compact unit with a common housing. It is intended for mounting to the rear subframe for a dual isolated installation.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump; Trump Announces New Iran Talks With Hormuz Shut
data.description: Futures experienced a decline as oil prices surged due to Iran's strict control over the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump revealed plans for new discussions on Monday. Tesla's upcoming earnings report is also generating anticipation. The Dow Jones Futures dropped amid these developments.

data.title: Monopar Presents Phase 3 Data Showing Greater Neurologic Benefit with ALXN1840 vs SoC in Wilson Disease Patients with Neurologic Symptoms at AAN 2026
data.description: Monopar Therapeutics Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company traded under Nasdaq as MNPR, revealed new findings from the Phase 3 FoCus trial of ALXN1840 (tiomolibdate choline, TMC) during the American Academy of Neurology Annual Meeting 2026 in Wilmette, Illinois. The trial showcased improved neurologic outcomes for Wilson disease patients with initial neurologic symptoms compared to those on standard care. The event occurred on April 19, 2026, as part of the presentation at the AAN conference, which runs from April 18-22, 2026.

data.title: Amplitude Research Reveals a Generational AI Trust Gap is Costing Australian Businesses
data.description: A recent study conducted by Amplitude in Sydney uncovered a notable disparity in trust towards AI among different generations within Australian businesses.
U.S. CRUDE FUTURES HIT HIGH OF $91.20/BBL, UP MORE THAN $7
